# Interview Prep - Java Project Setup Instructions

This is a Maven-based Java project for interview preparation.

## Project Configuration

- **Language**: Java 11
- **Build System**: Maven
- **Main Class**: programs.Main
- **Test Framework**: JUnit 4

## Build Commands

- Compile: `mvn clean compile`
- Run: `mvn exec:java`
- Test: `mvn test`
- Clean: `mvn clean`

## Project Structure

- `src/main/java/programs/` - Source code
- `src/test/java/programs/` - Test code
- `pom.xml` - Maven configuration

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Project structure created
- [x] Maven configuration (pom.xml) added
- [x] Main class created
- [x] JUnit dependency configured
- [x] Documentation added

## Next Steps

1. Add new Java classes to `src/main/java/programs/`
2. Write unit tests in `src/test/java/programs/`
3. Build and run the project using Maven
4. Customize dependencies in pom.xml as needed
